prose:
Fukui reactivity indices were computed for ferrocene using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase. The input geometry was provided from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz`. The calculation was performed with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The software used was xtb.

The most electrophilic site is Iron (Fe) at atom index 11 (1-based) with a Fukui f+ index of 0.22885.
The most nucleophilic site is Iron (Fe) at atom index 11 (1-based) with a Fukui f- index of 0.25938.

The Fukui f+ indices (for electrophilic attack) for all atoms are: [0.013638348, 0.013638348, 0.013638174, 0.013638597, 0.013638174, 0.063476418, 0.063476418, 0.063476206, 0.063475831, 0.063476206, 0.22885456, 0.013638348, 0.013638348, 0.013638174, 0.013638597, 0.013638174, 0.063476418, 0.063476418, 0.063476206, 0.063475831, 0.063476206].
The Fukui f- indices (for nucleophilic attack) for all atoms are: [0.012179196, 0.012179196, 0.012179338, 0.012179313, 0.012179338, 0.061882787, 0.061882787, 0.061882375, 0.061882339, 0.061882375, 0.25938191, 0.012179196, 0.012179196, 0.012179338, 0.012179313, 0.012179338, 0.061882787, 0.061882787, 0.061882375, 0.061882339, 0.061882375].
The dual descriptor indices for all atoms are: [0.0014591519, 0.0014591519, 0.0014588363, 0.0014592841, 0.0014588363, 0.0015936308, 0.0015936308, 0.001593831, 0.0015934927, 0.001593831, -0.030527354, 0.0014591519, 0.0014591519, 0.0014588363, 0.0014592841, 0.0014588363, 0.0015936308, 0.0015936308, 0.001593831, 0.0015934927, 0.001593831].

The integrity of the calculation is trustworthy, and no warnings were reported.
